summary: Crisp soundboard recording of a solid early‑80s Cleveland show, highlighted by an epic Birdsong jam and a tight China > Rider sequence.
review: The three reviewers all praise the performance, noting that the first set is strong with a standout Birdsong improvisation, an intense LLR moment, and a seamless China > I Know You Rider transition. The Lost Sailor > Saint of Circumstance segue also gets kudos, while the soundboard source is described as crisp despite a faint background hiss.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑star reviews emphasize both solid musical performance and clear soundboard quality, with only minor hiss noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp SBD capture; slight background hiss but overall clear and well‑balanced.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as solid and energetic, with natural transitions (e.g., China > Rider) that keep the momentum high throughout.
